metadata.description: Official Axoniq agent skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: axoniq-migration
plugins.description: Migrate applications from Axon Framework 4 to Axon Framework 5 / Axoniq Framework 5.

plugins.name: axoniq-app-development
plugins.description: Skills for developers building applications with Axon Framework 5: command handling and event-sourced entities, DCB decision models, event handling and processors, query handling, the event store and conversion, messaging foundations, configuration, and testing.

plugins.name: axoniq-framework-contribution
plugins.description: Tools for contributors to the Axon Framework project: code reviews against AF5 standards, core coding patterns, framework infrastructure design guidelines, reference documentation authoring, and PR comment processing. Not intended for application developers.
